summary: Completed frontend testing of Admin Settings page and Finance User Permissions. All requested features verified: Admin Settings page accessible via Security sidebar (super_admin only), Current Environment section, Data Statistics with all counts, Reset All Data with confirmation dialog, Feature Flags with environment toggles, and Finance user Module Permissions with View/Edit/Delete checkboxes.
passed_tests: Admin Settings page accessible via Security > Admin Settings sidebar (super_admin only)
Current Environment section shows DEVELOPMENT badge and database name (clt_synapse_dev)
Available Environments displays: development, testing, production badges
Data Statistics shows counts for: Super Admins (1), Other Users (13), Leads (4), Students (2), Payments (0), Employees (16), Call Logs (6), Tasks (0)
Reset All Data button opens confirmation dialog
Reset dialog shows warning 'This action cannot be undone'
Reset dialog lists what will be deleted (users, leads, students, payments, HR data, call logs, finance data)
Reset dialog has password input field
Reset dialog requires typing 'RESET ALL DATA' to confirm
Reset dialog confirm button is disabled until confirmation text matches
Feature Flags section displays with Add Flag button
Feature flag environment toggle columns: Development, Testing, Production
Default feature flags present: Finance Suite, BioCloud Attendance Sync, 3CX Phone Integration, Commission Engine, Mentor CRM
Add Flag dialog opens with form fields: Flag Name (code), Display Name, Description
Add Flag dialog has environment checkboxes (Development, Testing, Production)
Finance user permissions: Module Permissions section appears when selecting finance role
Finance permissions shows Entity Access section with CLT Academy and MILES checkboxes
Module Permissions displays View/Edit/Delete toggles for each finance module
Finance modules include: Treasury Settlements, Budgeting, Overall PNL, Data Management
Quick action buttons available: 'View Only (All)', 'Edit (No Delete)', 'Clear All'

admin_settings_verification.page_access: PASS - Via Security > Admin Settings (super_admin only)

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Settings page fully functional at /admin-settings route. Accessed via Security module > Admin Settings in sidebar (visible only for super_admin role). Page contains: Current Environment card (shows environment, database name, available environments), Data Statistics cards (8 stat cards showing counts), Reset All Data section with confirmation dialog (requires password + typing 'RESET ALL DATA'), Feature Flags section with environment toggles (Development/Testing/Production) and Add Flag functionality. Finance user permissions appear in Create/Edit User modal when selecting any finance role (finance_manager, finance_admin, etc.) - shows Entity Access checkboxes and Module Permissions with View/Edit/Delete toggles.
testing_method: Playwright browser automation with login authentication
